title: Nichrome Ignition Wire Controller
selected_approach: 1 cm Nichrome wire (30 AWG, ~1 Ω) connecting sample pellet inside bomb vessel. Energised by a capacitor discharge circuit (1000 μF, 12 V) triggered by Arduino digital pin via MOSFET. Single-shot ignition; wire fuses on firing. Optical isolation between Arduino and high-current discharge path.
